name: Class 1-A | Lost in New York with them!?
description:
Got bored, so...here.

Got the idea while in New York again :D

We got EVERYONE in Class 1-A here, plus Aizawa and Present Mic as your teachers.

(It's main-character POV, so Midoriya isn't in this one. I'll release a version with him in it soon ^>)

Enjoy!
